rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft Typis Roverianis Imprimerie nationale, Akademie der Wissenschaften in Hamburg

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: Treatises on computus and chronology
On the 532 year cycle
On the computus of the epacts
On years, months and seasons
On the epagomenous days and leap years
On the epacts and the golden ratio
Number of days, hours and fifths of hours from the Creation to the Apocalypse
Computus of fast and feast days
On the epochs of St John, the jubilees, the sabbath of Enoch and of Sybil
Chronology of Jewish history
Chronology of the kings of Ethiopia from ʾAbrǝhā and ʾAṣbaḥa to Galāwdewos
Dates of the life of Jesus Christ
How to determine the year of the long and short cycle
On the days on which the epacts fall in the four evangelists' years
On errors of the Ethiopian computus
On the calculus of indictions
On the epagomenous days
On the beginning of the solar computus (the fourth day of Creation)
On the beginning of the computus of the creation of Heaven and Earth
The epacts of the moon since Adam
The first and last days of the seven millennia
On the ten sabbaths of 700 years
Treatise on the dates of the incarnation, birth, baptism, death and resurrection of Jesus Christ
On the four year evangelists' cycle (on the days of their beginnings) and the epacts.
On the golden number
Chronological excerpts
On passages of Henok and Maṣḥafa kufāle relating to the epagomenous days
On the length of the days and nights in the twelve months of the year, according to Henok
On the increasing and decreasing of the length of the days and nights
Explanation of the chapter of Henok dealing with the moon's revolutions
On the lunar phases and their dates
On the moon's revolutions and their dates
On the risings of the moon
On the moon's decrease
Table of the epacts and the lunar months for the 19 year cycle
On the stars, their stations, their risings, and ascensions (according to Henok, Chapter 82)
On the wind and other meteorological phenomena, according to Henok
On the new moon and other lunar phases
ሐሳበ፡ ክንትሮስ፡
Main dates of the lives of Jesus Christ, St Mary and John
Beginning of an enumeration of the wives and children of ያዕቆብ፡'s twelve sons
Table of the new moons for three 19-year-cycles and of the epacts
Treatises and glosses on various biblical passages and various treatises on the chronology of Jewish and Ethiopian history
Symbolical explanations of biblical passages
Names of the Greek and Roman months
Three concentric circles representing the zodiac, the eight spheres (the seven heavens and the heaven of fixed stars) and the seven planetary spheres
Names of the Hebrew months
Enumeration of the seven Jewish feasts, the ten plagues of Egypt and the tribes placed on mount Garizim and mount Hebal
Chronology of the judges and kings of Israel and Judah since Adam
Enumeration of the kings of Edom
Chronology of the patriarchs, judges and kings of Israel and Judah and of the kings of Ethiopia until the 13th year of the reign of Claudius
Summary of the chronology of the Old Testament until the birth of Jesus Christ
Astronomical calculation of the birth, baptism and death of Jesus Christ
Note on the number of bishops assembled at the Council of Nicaea, according to Cyril
Table of the 33 calculations of the time of Easter with the Golden Number
Enumeration of the Lord's feasts
Fragment of the chronology of the history of Ethiopia
List of the metropolitans of Ethiopia
List of the patriarchs of Alexandria
Note on the prophecy of Simon
Explanation of technical terms used in the description of the tabernacle
Symbolic explanation of Daniel's visions
Table for the calculation of the 141 jubilees
Table for the calculation of 13 dionysian periods of 532 years
Spiritual genealogy of the abbots of the monasteries of House of Takla Hāymānot and House of Sāmuʾel of Wāldǝbbā
